diagrams.title: One-Dimensional Array Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how int arr[5] = {10, 20, 30, 40, 50} is stored in contiguous memory locations
elements: Array name 'arr' points to base address 1000
diagrams.purpose: Understanding contiguous memory allocation and indexing in arrays

diagrams.title: Two-Dimensional Array as Matrix
diagrams.description: Visualizes int matrix[2][3] as rows and columns with memory representation
elements: Row-major storage: elements stored sequentially by rows
Arrows showing how 2D maps to 1D contiguous memory
diagrams.purpose: Understanding 2D array structure and row-major order storage in memory
